example: 「对…说」(duì…shuō, to speak to) — coverb 对 + addressee + 说: 我对他说 (I said to him). 对 marks the addressee for speech verbs
「对…感兴趣」(duì…gǎn xìngqù, to be interested in) — 我对历史感兴趣 (I am interested in history). Predicate phrase with 对-marked topic
「对…有信心」(duì…yǒu xìnxīn, to have confidence in) — 对未来有信心 (have confidence in the future)
「对…友好」(duì…yǒuhǎo, to be friendly to) — 对客人友好 (be friendly to guests). 对 marks the recipient of attitude
「对…满意」(duì…mǎnyì, to be satisfied with) — 对结果满意 (satisfied with the result)
「对…负责」(duì…fùzé, to be responsible for) — 对你负责 (be responsible for you)
「跟…说」(gēn…shuō, to talk with) — 跟朋友说话 (talk with a friend). 跟 emphasizes reciprocity, vs. 对 (one-directional addressing)
「跟…学」(gēn…xué, to learn from) — 跟老师学中文 (learn Chinese from the teacher). 跟 marks the source of learning
「跟…商量」(gēn…shāngliáng, to discuss with) — 跟父母商量 (discuss with parents)
「跟…结婚」(gēn…jiéhūn, to marry) — 跟她结婚 (marry her). Coverb 跟 marks the spouse
「和…一起」(hé…yīqǐ, together with) — 和朋友一起去 (go together with friends). 和 functions as the connective preposition for accompaniment
「给…打电话」(gěi…dǎ diànhuà, to call) — 给妈妈打电话 (call mom). 给 marks the recipient of the action
「给…写信」(gěi…xiě xìn, to write a letter to) — 给朋友写信 (write a letter to a friend)
「给…买」(gěi…mǎi, to buy for) — 给孩子买玩具 (buy a toy for the child). 给 = 'for the benefit of'
「给…介绍」(gěi…jièshào, to introduce to) — 给我介绍一下 (introduce [it/them] to me)
「在…工作」(zài…gōngzuò, to work at) — 在公司工作 (work at the company). 在 marks location of action
「在…学习」(zài…xuéxí, to study at) — 在大学学习 (study at university)
「在…住」(zài…zhù, to live in) — 在北京住 (live in Beijing)
「从…来」(cóng…lái, to come from) — 从美国来 (come from America). 从 marks origin/source
「从…出发」(cóng…chūfā, to depart from) — 从北京出发 (depart from Beijing)
「到…去」(dào…qù, to go to) — 到中国去 (go to China). 到 marks destination/endpoint
「到…来」(dào…lái, to come to) — 到我家来 (come to my place)
「把」(bǎ) — fronts the affected object before the verb: 我把书放在桌子上 (I put the book on the table). The 把-construction emphasizes how the object is handled
「被」(bèi) — passive marker: 他被打了 (he was hit). Optional agent: 他被人打了 (he was hit by someone). Often carries adversative connotation
「为…工作」(wèi…gōngzuò, to work for) — 为人民工作 (work for the people). 为 = 'for the benefit/sake of'
「为…高兴」(wèi…gāoxìng, to be happy for) — 为你高兴 (I'm happy for you)
「为…担心」(wèi…dānxīn, to worry about/for) — 为孩子担心 (worry about the child)
「为了」(wèile, in order to) — 为了健康 (for the sake of health), 为了学好中文 (in order to learn Chinese well). Purpose marker, takes nouns or VPs
「向…走」(xiàng…zǒu, to walk toward) — 向前走 (walk forward), 向北走 (head north). 向 marks direction
「向…学习」(xiàng…xuéxí, to learn from / model after) — 向英雄学习 (learn from heroes). 向 with 学习 means emulation
「关于…谈」(guānyú…tán, to talk about) — 关于这个问题 (regarding this question). 关于 = 'regarding/concerning', topical marker
「由…组成」(yóu…zǔchéng, to be composed of) — 由三部分组成 (composed of three parts). 由 marks source/agent in formal/written register
「等于」(děngyú, to equal) — 一加一等于二 (one plus one equals two). 于 fuses with 等
「属于」(shǔyú, to belong to) — 这本书属于我 (this book belongs to me). Verb-yu compound; takes the possessor directly
「适应」(shìyìng, to adapt to) — 适应新环境 (adapt to a new environment). NO coverb; direct object pattern
「习惯」(xíguàn, to be used to) — 习惯北京的天气 (be used to Beijing's weather). Direct object
「担心」(dānxīn, to worry about) — 担心你的健康 (worry about your health). Takes direct object, not 关于
「想念」(xiǎngniàn, to miss) — 想念家人 (miss family). Direct object — no preposition
「害怕」(hàipà, to fear) — 害怕黑暗 (fear darkness). Direct object — no preposition like English 'be afraid OF'
「希望」(xīwàng, to hope) — 希望你成功 (hope you succeed). Takes a clausal complement directly
「觉得」(juéde, to feel/think) — 觉得很好 (think it's good). Takes a clausal complement
